title: Social Media Extremism Detection
description: Deep learning solution using fine-tuned HuggingFace Transformers for detecting extremist content on social media. Conducted comparative analysis with classical ML models (Logistic Regression, SVC, MLPClassifier, XGBoost) achieving 94% accuracy with fine-tuned model.

title: Diabetes Prediction
description: 2-layer Feed Forward Neural Network built with PyTorch Lightning for large-scale tabular binary classification. Implemented robust preprocessing pipeline with custom OutlierClipper and ColumnTransformer. Optimized hyperparameters using Optuna (Learning Rate, Hidden Dimensions, Dropout).

title: Loan Payback Prediction
description: Binary classifier developed for 590k+ financial records, achieving 0.922 ROC AUC in Kaggle competition. Built automated preprocessing pipelines using ColumnTransformer and optimized XGBoost hyperparameters to handle significant class imbalance. Managed end-to-end workflow with automated Kaggle submissions.

title: Vehicle Parking Management System
description: Multi-user web application built with Flask for managing parking lots, spots, and vehicle reservations. Engineered robust SQLAlchemy logic for dynamic capacity adjustments and cascading deletes. Resolved template pathing errors and implemented Jinja2 filters for accurate billing calculations.
